resources.string: Choose your preferred lock screen charging animation style
Customize the apps displayed on the lock screen side panel
Allow access to the power menu while the device is locked
Play sound when Silent mode is turned off
Requires Wi-Fi to be restarted to take effect
Choose a Design for Your Big Tiles
Show AM/PM only if seconds are off
Show AM/PM only if seconds are off
Type of tiles in Iconify menu
Enable or disable device spoof components
Use dynamic fingerprint to try to achieve MEETS_DEVICE_INTEGRITY. Turn off it to use custom fingerprint module
Enable to use google photo unlimited backup
Spoof device is Pixel for some google apps. Always on on non-pixel devices
Spoof device for each different game to enable high configuration for certain games
Spoof device is Pixel 9 Pro XL for some google apps
Spoof Pixel 9 Pro XL for all Google apps
Spoof device is Pixel 9 Pro XL for all Google apps
Device spoofing as a tablet for all apps
Use static fingerprint set in the system instead of device fingerprint
Use keybox fingerprint to try to achieve MEETS_STRONG_INTEGRITY. Turn it off when lost google play certificate or want to use custom fingerprint module
Spoof Pixel 9 Pro XL device for Snapchat

••MoveOS V6 Global •Author: MeZo (Mohammed). •MoveOS V6 is Pure Global ROM. •OS3.0.2.0.VOKMIXM-user-16_0 •Android Security Patch: 2026.01.15 •Tester: @mezo ********************************* •Thanks to Miui for some fixes. •Thanks to you for using MoveOS on your Mobile. • If you like my work and want to help you can DM Me Thank you! ********************************* •Install from fastboot/pc: 1-Extract zip file 2-Connect phone to pc in fastboot mode 3-Inside folder run install and format data .bat file and wait to finish. ********************************* •Change log: •Rom updated on 2026/2/1. •The Rom passes the CTS test by default, use Kaoiros Toolbox. ******************************** •New additions: •Rom deodex. •Bootloader spoof. •File system erofs read only. •Added information header to control center. •Added MoveOS menu. •Reordered MoveOS menu. •Image added in settings. •Added style change in about phone. •Added menu for all system icons. •Added change 33 status bar styles. •Fix theme reset. •Disable signature verification. (framework patcher). •Added screenshot in secure app. (framework patcher). •Fix notifications delay. (framework patcher). •Implemented maximum FPS in all apps. (Thanks to @MMETMAmods for guide). •Added hide privacy icon on camera. (Thanks to @MMETMAmods for the guide). •Added Launcher mod by kashi. (Thanks to @ModsCenter). •Added PackageInstaller mod by kashi. (Thanks to @ModsCenter). •Added 7 notifications icons. (Thanks to @MMETMAmods for guide). •Added file manager mod. (Thanks to @llionsmods). •Added plugin mod. (Thanks to @EvoMods). •Added frame screenshot. •Colors have been modified in about the device. (Thanks to @cazymods for the guide). •Added new MoveOS logo. •Added Security center removed countdown counter. •Added new wallpapers. •Added YMusic app. •Added Brave browser. •And more... •Added many improvements for stability, battery saving, improved connections and more...
•Known Bugs: ******************************** •Downloads and support: •Telegram Channel: •MoveOS Rom Zircon Redmi Note 13 Pro+.
•Support: •MoveOS Rom Redmi Note 13 Pro+Support.
•Rom Version: V6 Global
Enabling this might increase the battery consumption
New style of icons for networks, batteries, navigation buttons
Thanks you very much for using MoveOS on your phone. I hope the experience is to your liking.
Disable the Camera, Mic & Location privacy chip
Data Saver prevents some apps from sending or receiving data in the background
Show clock about phone mini screen
Show month about phone mini screen
Show day about phone mini screen
Customize clock color, size, font etc
Customize network icons to your choice
Margin in sim and data icon
Animations, Control center, Status bar, Icons...
Play protect, Security update, Find device
Date & time, Floating window, Memory extension...
Hide Mi Account from the settings page
Status icon color, size, offset etc
Set black and clear to zero to set as default
You are now a PRO user
Subscribe to become a PRO user

"🍒 - emoji yyyy - four digit year (2023) yy - two digit year (23) MMMM - long month (August) MMM - short month (Aug) MM - two digit month (12) M - one digit month (12) dd - two digit day (02) d - one digit day (2) E - short week (Sun) EEEE - long week (Sunday) a - AM PM aa - Morning, Afternoon, Evening HH - 24-hour two digit hour (21) H - 24-hour one digit hour (21) hh - 12-hour two digit hour (09) h - 12-hour one digit hour (9) mm - two digit minute (09) "
The color of the style you choose will depend on the wallpaper you have installed.
Disable the clock transition between status bar and notifications shade
Control which apps and devices can read notifications
Full settings, all application settings are here
Visualize notification sounds and ringtones with a flashlight
Press it to apply all changes
Hide clock and buttons in control panel
Speed update interval from 4 seconds to 1 second
Works only when Monet is disabled in the system
Media player style in notifications and on the lock screen
Monet Control Center and Volume Panel
Big signal type on left side of data icon
Change Battery Icon to Old MIUI
Squiggly Progress Bar in Media Player
Modify the Look of Your Big Tiles
Active Blur Effect for Media Player
Active Custom Title for Play History
Show Device Name in Media Player
Set Custom Title for Edit Button
Change The Edit Button To Tile Style
Disable to Allow Module Usage with Custom Fingerprint Values
Spoof device for each different game to enable high configuration for certain games
Spoof Google Play Store as Pixel 9 Pro XL
Spoof Google Apps as Pixel 9 Pro XL. Warning: You may receive notifications about the Pixel update. Ignore them!
Enable to use google photo unlimited backup
Spoof Pixel XL device for Snapchat
Always Show Full Screen Call Page
Show Keyboard When You Open Dialer
Ask for Confirmation Before Dialing from Call Logs
Hide No Balance Info from Mobile Network
Enable Colored Name in Call Log"

Unlock Dynamic Notification for More Apps

First change the battery icon to "MIUI (Oval)"
Compact icons in the status bar

Select the keybox XML file used to spoofing the key attestation in the system. Click delete to reset the keybox data
Spoof your device to pass Google Play Attestation
Show all currently set PIF properties
Download update PIF spoofing device. Requires internet connection
Choose the PIF JSON file to be used to spoof Play Integrity
Spoof a select group of Google apps to the latest Pixel device
Spoof the device storage encryption status to 'Encrypted'
Spoof the Google app to the latest Pixel device to unlock exclusive features
Spoof the Play Store to the latest Pixel device
Spoof the Google Photos app as a Pixel XL
Spoof your device as different model for specific games to unlock higher FPS
Spoof Snapchat as a Pixel XL to fix possible chat issues
Or try long-pressing Edit button in Control Center

Works when volume bar is collapsed
Before applying colors, disable Monet Control Center
Don't Group Old Notifications into "Earlier Notifications"
Fixing icons in the status bar
The setup is performed only once after installing the ROM with data clearing
Move all sliders to the right and left once to adjust the position of the icons in the status bar
Shows Temp, Current, Voltage and Power on Lockscreen
Double tap on status bar turns off the screen
Display custom date before the clock
Must be in DateFormat eg. MM/dd/yy
Customize clock and date in statusbar
For better visibility on bright images
Long press on any image to use for static mode

To control the settings of On Of and set the BackGround transparency ... Go to the Custom Expanded Interface...And how to Set the header image Select the Header Provider set to Static ... And To Select the Image Click Browse installed headers ... And select the image as you like and Long press on the image to set it ...
Pulse is brilliant equalizer bar style audio visualization on the Navigation bar when music plays. Pulse does not work with some audio sources when listening on device speaker
Audio visualization on the Navigation bar
Enable a smooth lava lamp style color blend animation
Disable to use a smooth lava lamp style color blend animation
Only works in statusbar styles 1 and 3
Image and clock for title table
Limit icon size and number of icons
Clock style option for header panel.

You need to reboot your device to change this setting.

Keep same refresh rate across all apps

Allow taking screenshot in any app
Keep notifs on lock until checked
Change device model for different apps/games
Set your own or default pif profile

Spoof Play Store to latest Pixel device
Discuss MoveOS Roms in telegram group
Rows count in expanded Miui11 panel
Toggles count in expanded Miui11 panel
Subscribe to become a PRO user
Extra features for immersive gaming experience
Redefining your Move OS with our new update which offers minimal UI enhancement and close to Stock Royal OS with customization
Your experience while using our ROM will be buttery smooth without compromising the quality of the Royal OS
Tap here to download builds for your respective devices
Do visit our website, You will get all necessary info here
If you have any issues, do share in our telegram discussion group
Subscribe us on telegram channel for faster updates

Dont Direct Message any devs, groups are there for some reason and use some brain. If we see any direct message we will ban him or her from everywhere. We arent here to serve you 24*7 so just keep patience. Just let us live our life peacefully

• As a matter of fact that in order to build a Custom ROM there are certain pre-requisite such as a High-End Building Server (Jenkins) or PC having very High-End technical specification combined with a very High-Speed internet connection.
• We developers need to allot our time and hard work from our Academics hefty schedule in the proper maintenance of the custom ROM so that we can provide users with timely and stable updates
• Do consider donating or buying me a coffee on Paypal or join us on Patreon for sustainable support and rewards if you want to appreciate our work
Patreon is for those who wants to support devs, get early build access, some exclusive features and benefits.
Donate to keep Project active and running

Disable the Camera, Mic & Location privacy chip

Choose Color Effect from Monet Picker
